indicators.name: long corridor
indicators.rationale: The long corridor limits the available floor space for yoga practice.

indicators.name: columns lining walls
indicators.rationale: Columns reduce the available floor space and create visual clutter.

indicators.name: paintings on ceiling
indicators.rationale: Paintings on the ceiling can be distracting and may pose a risk if they are not securely attached.

indicators.name: glass windows
indicators.rationale: Glass windows may allow natural light but also pose a safety hazard if not properly secured.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is poorly suited for yoga due to the long corridor, columns, paintings on the ceiling, and glass windows. The limited floor space and visual clutter make it difficult to perform yoga safely and comfortably.
